name: save-my-tokens
description: Semantic code graph for efficient codebase exploration. Provides symbol lookup, dependency analysis, impact assessment, and semantic search via the smt CLI.

skills.name: Symbol Definition
skills.description: What is this symbol? Returns signature, docstring, immediate callees. 1-hop lookup.

skills.name: Symbol Context
skills.description: What do I need to work on this? Returns symbol + N-hop callees + callers, cycles collapsed.
examples: What context do I need for GraphBuilder?

skills.name: Change Impact Analysis
skills.description: What breaks if I change this? Returns all callers grouped by distance.
examples: What breaks if I change Neo4jClient?

skills.name: Semantic Code Search
skills.description: Find symbols by meaning using local embeddings. No API calls.
examples: Find code related to cycle detection

skills.name: Graph Health Check
skills.description: Check graph freshness, node/edge counts, and git commit alignment. Always run at session start.

skills.name: Caller Lookup
skills.description: Shorthand for context with callers only. Who calls this symbol?

skills.name: Multi-Agent Analysis Harness
skills.description: Orchestrates Scout + Fabler + PathFinder subagents for deep codebase analysis: impact prediction, isolation finding, dependency mapping.
examples: What breaks if I refactor CallAnalyzer?
What parts can be worked on independently?
